zh.lifeSummary: 當William Wiatt de Southange於1350年出生在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特黑格時，他的父親Adam "The Admiral" "Wiotus" Wyatt26歲，母親Lady Agnes  Baroness of Basing Wiotus  Wigton Wyatt30歲。他於大約1370年與Lady Jane Bailiffe在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1388年在他的家鄉享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Wiatt de Southange于1350年出生在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特黑格时，他的父亲Adam "The Admiral" "Wiotus" Wyatt26岁，母亲Lady Agnes  Baroness of Basing Wiotus  Wigton Wyatt30岁。他于大约1370年与Lady Jane Bailiffe在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1388年在他的家乡享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wiatt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wyatt
meanings: from the Middle English personal names Wiot or Wiet. These are often pet forms of Wy, from ancient Germanic Wido (see Guy , compare Wyand 1). Wy is the usual Norman French form of the name; the Parisian French form is Guy. Wiot was also used as a diminutive of William . As a surname Wyot(t) became Wyatt during the 16th century.

in Suffolk, this is sometimes a variant of Wyard, from the Middle English personal name Wiard, which is generally from Old English Wīgheard, which is composed of the elements wīg ‘battle’ + heard ‘bold, brave’. Occasionally it may be from Old French Wiard, ancient Germanic Withard (see Viard ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Wiatt de Southange was born in 1350, in Haigh, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam "The Admiral" "Wiotus" Wyatt, was 26 and his mother, Lady Agnes  Baroness of Basing Wiotus  Wigton Wyatt, was 30. He married Lady Jane Bailiffe about 1370, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1388, in his hometown, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Wiatt de Southange est né en 1350, à Haigh, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam "The Admiral" "Wiotus" Wyatt, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes  Baroness of Basing Wiotus  Wigton Wyatt, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jane Bailiffe environ 1370, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1388, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William Wiatt de Southange(이)가 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 하이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam "The Admiral" "Wiotus" Wyatt(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes  Baroness of Basing Wiotus  Wigton Wyatt(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1370년 영국 요르크실르에서 Lady Jane Bailiffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1388년 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Wiatt de Southange родился в 1350 г. в местности хеиг, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam "The Admiral" "Wiotus" Wyatt было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes  Baroness of Basing Wiotus  Wigton Wyatt, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jane Bailiffe около 1370 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1388 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет.
